experience.title: React.js  Developer
experience.description:
Frontend Developer | Janus Koncepts

Developed and maintained responsive web and mobile applications using React.js, Redux, Material-UI, and React Native. Built reusable UI components and dashboards to improve performance and consistency across devices, integrated REST APIs for seamless data flow, and optimized code for better scalability and maintainability.

Projects:

| Outdoor Advertising Management Platform | React.js, Redux, Material-UI, REST APIs |

- Built a web platform to manage outdoor advertising campaigns across airports, metros, and malls.
- Added features like campaign scheduling, tracking, and client dashboards to streamline operations.
- Improved UI/UX consistency and overall performance, ensuring faster load times and better responsiveness.

| Jewelry Bliss App | React Native, Redux, REST APIs |

- Developed an Android and iOS jewelry shopping app with a focus on smooth navigation and user experience.
- Implemented product search, cart management, and secure checkout for seamless transactions.
- Ensured the app ran efficiently with optimized performance and reliable cross-device compatibility.

experience.title: React.js Developer
experience.description:
Frontend Developer | 18th Digitech Pvt. Ltd

Worked on multiple e-commerce platforms, including Crocs and SF-Cable, focusing on building responsive, user-friendly, and high-performance interfaces. Enhanced product listing and checkout modules to improve speed, usability, and overall shopping experience. Also developed B2B modules, dynamic product bundles, and implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication to ensure secure and reliable user access.

Projects:

| Crocs E-commerce Platform | React.js, PWA, REST APIs |

- Designed and developed a responsive UI with integrated analytics tracking to monitor user behavior and platform performance.
- Improved the checkout flow, achieving faster load times and better user satisfaction through optimized performance and cleaner code structure.

| SF-Cable Platform | React.js, Tailwind CSS, PWA, REST APIs |

- Created a full-featured online electronics store with B2B functionality, allowing smooth business-to-business transactions and easier client management.
- Built reusable UI components and implemented Progressive Web App (PWA) features for offline access and an app-like experience across devices.

headline: Experienced Frontend Software Engineer | React, Redux & Typescript | Crafting Dynamic Web Applications | Passionate About Creating Tech Content
about:
Hi, I’m M. A. Saraswathi, a Frontend Engineer based in Bengaluru with over 3 years of experience building scalable and responsive web applications.

I specialize in React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Redux, and modern UI frameworks like TailwindCSS and MUI. I’ve worked across diverse domains — including e-commerce and finance — where I’ve turned design ideas into high-performing, user-friendly products.

At my last organization, I also had the opportunity to mentor interns, guide them on clean coding practices, and review pull requests to ensure code quality and maintainability across projects.

After a planned career break for maternity, I continued upskilling through hands-on React projects and learning new tools in the frontend ecosystem. I’m now actively looking for opportunities to contribute to impactful products, collaborate with creative teams, and grow as a frontend developer.

💡 Tech Stack: React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Redux, HTML5, CSS3, TailwindCSS, MUI, Jest, Git
📬 Always open to connecting and exploring frontend roles in dynamic product teams!

experience.title: Desenvolvedor Fullstack
experience.description:
👉 Fui responsável pelo desenvolvimento de uma aplicação que traduz gestos nas línguas nacionais de Angola, faz traduções de textos e oferece uma área de ensino de línguas locais. Também implementei um chat de tradução em tempo real para facilitar a comunicação entre usuários de diferentes idiomas. A aplicação foi reconhecida como uma das 50 melhores startups do mundo em uma exposição realizada em Dubai, promovida pela Expand North Star durante a GITEX Global 2024, alcançando um grau de aceitação de até 75% entre os participantes.

👉 Desenvolvi uma aplicação que localiza postos de combustíveis próximos ao usuário, fornecendo informações em tempo real sobre a disponibilidade de combustíveis.

experience.title: Desenvolvedor Frontend / Mobile Team Leader
experience.description:
👉 Desenvolvi uma aplicação para rastreamento da veracidade de comprovativos de pagamentos no ambiente educacional, com foco na prevenção de fraudes, reduzindo em até 80% as ocorrências de comprovativos falsificados, aumentando a segurança e confiança no processo financeiro.

👉 Fui responsável pela automação do sino da instituição, permitindo que a área administrativa agendasse os horários de acionamento e utilizasse um canal de rádio para transmitir informações aos alunos. A automação resultou em uma melhoria de 75% na gestão e na comunicação interna da instituição.

👉 Participei no desenvolvimento de uma plataforma de streaming de vídeos para a instituição, permitindo que os pais acompanhassem remotamente as actividades internas da escola, além de oferecer acesso à galeria de fotos registradas durante as actividades.

👉 Desenvolvi interfaces com atenção ao conceito de pixel perfect, assegurando alto desempenho e acessibilidade para os usuários finais.

👉 Criei uma um sistema usando IA para avaliação e análise de sentimentos nos feedbacks dos estudantes, coletados durante as avaliações. A IA possibilitou à instituição acessar relatórios detalhados, com base nas respostas fornecidas, além de gerar insights sobre as dificuldades e limitações dos estudantes.

👉 Participei no desenvolvimento do “Client Dashboard” de uma máquina de gestão e distribuição de folhas de prova, permitindo que o usuário gerenciasse sua conta, levantasse folhas de prova, boletins de notas e solicitasse o carregamento da carteira. Esse sistema interativo aumentou a eficiência no processo de distribuição das folhas de prova em até 52%.

headline: Développeur ReactJs chez Rakuten France

experience.title: Développeur ReactJs
experience.description:
Développeur passionné par la création d'applications web performantes, avec une forte orientation vers les bonnes pratiques et l'implémentation du clean code. J'ai contribué à plusieurs projets stratégiques au sein de Rakuten France, en mettant un accent particulier sur la qualité du code et les tests.

Solution open-source basée sur OpenStreetMap : Conception et développement d'une alternative à Google Maps.

Migration de la messagerie : Pilotage de la migration du système de chat vers React 18, TypeScript, et Next.js 13, en intégrant des tests unitaires robustes et en accompagnant les développeurs sur les bonnes pratiques.

Refonte du tunnel de mise en vente : Optimisation de l'expérience utilisateur et des performances via le rendu côté serveur (SSR), tout en respectant les exigences SEO et en intégrant des tests pour valider chaque évolution.

Messagerie instantanée : Développement d'une messagerie intégrée avec une fonctionnalité de négociation, en veillant à la qualité du code et à la couverture des tests pour garantir la stabilité.

Migration React et design system : Passage de React 15 à 16 et création d'un design system en collaboration avec l'équipe UX, avec un fort accent sur l'accessibilité, la cohérence et l'implémentation de tests pour valider les nouveaux composants.

headline: Developer freelance
about:
[English below please]
こんにちは、私名前はピエルです。東京住んでいます。フランスジンです。英語とフランスゴ話せます。日本語が勉強します。少し分かりますと話せます、でも、まだ上手じゃありません。

今、私の趣味はクラミングと日本語の勉強と開発者ウェブ.

はじめまして。

Currently living in Tokyo,  Japan, as a self employed web developer. I mostly develop websites in Wordpress for craftsman in La Réunion (french island), but I also develop them with technologies such as React / Next / Typescript, in order to stay sharped technically speaking, but also because I just like development.

I am open to any work's propositions in Japan, because I also like to work as a group, and I like the challenge of adapting to a new company & people.

Mostly self taught as a developer, I yet have successful company's experiences for more than two years.
